Welcome to Notebook

Here you can write code, documentation

About the file directory

The ` project` directory is the workspace for this project. You can place all files related to running the project here; any additions, deletions, or modifications made to files in this directory will be preserved.

The ` input` directory is where datasets are mounted. All datasets mounted into the project are located here. The `input` directory is hidden when no datasets
